name: Golden Triangle Tour with Varanasi
overview: Explore the best of Delhi, Agra, Jaipur, Varanasi with our expertly crafted tour package. Mother India Tour Travels provides comfortable AC vehicles, experienced guides, and hand-picked accommodations to make your journey unforgettable.
inclusions: Accommodation in listed or similar hotels
All transfers and sightseeing by private AC vehicle
All long distance travel as per itinerary
Chauffeur, Toll Taxes, Parking, Fuel charges
State Taxes, Green Taxes, Road Taxes
exclusions: Personal expenses (porterage, tips, laundry, mineral water)
Monument entrance fees and camera charges
Any activity not mentioned in inclusions
Additional cost due to flight cancellation, roadblocks, political unrest
notes: Taj Mahal is closed every Friday
Prices are per person on twin sharing basis

itinerary.title: Arrival at Delhi Airport company representative assist you and transfer to the h
itinerary.description: Arrival at Delhi Airport company representative assist you and transfer to the hotel. Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Today, after breakfast, we took a guided tour to visit Jama Masjid, Red Fort, In
itinerary.description: Today, after breakfast, we took a guided tour to visit Jama Masjid, Red Fort, India Gate, President House, Parliament, Qutub Minar, Lotus Temple, Humayun’. Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Delhi to Jaipur(260 kms
itinerary.description: Delhi to Jaipur(260 kms. 6 hrs. approx.): Today, after breakfast, proceed to Jaipur. Lunch on the way and overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Jaipur sightseeing: Today after breakfast, a guided tour to visit Amber Fort, Wa
itinerary.description: Jaipur sightseeing: Today after breakfast, a guided tour to visit Amber Fort, Water Palace, Hawa Mahal (Window Palace), City Place and Observatory (Jantar Mantar), Rajasthani handicraft. Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Jaipur  to Agra (260 kms
itinerary.description: Jaipur  to Agra (260 kms. 6 hrs. approx.): Today after breakfast, proceed to Agra, a guided tour to visit the Tajmahal. Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Agra to Khajuraho(400 kms
itinerary.description: Agra to Khajuraho(400 kms. 9 hrs. approx.), Today after breakfast drive to Khajuraho En-Route visiting Orchha. Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Khajuraho Sightseeing: After breakfast, proceed to visit the most famous Western
itinerary.description: Khajuraho Sightseeing: After breakfast, proceed to visit the most famous Western Temple’s, Jain Temple, and city centre walk, Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Khajuraho to Varanasi (400 kms
itinerary.description: Khajuraho to Varanasi (400 kms. 9-10 hrs. approx.): After breakfast proceed to Varanasi & overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Varanasi sightseeing: Today early morning boat ride on the holy river Ganges to
itinerary.description: Varanasi sightseeing: Today early morning boat ride on the holy river Ganges to see the famous bathing Ghats site. After breakfast, visit Vishwanath temple, Sankat mochan temple, BHEU & Sarnath. Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Today after breakfast drop you at Varanasi Airport/Railway station for your onwa
itinerary.description:
Today after breakfast drop you at Varanasi Airport/Railway station for your onward journey .
Please note: Taj Mahal Close on Every Friday
Please note: We can arrange tailor-made tours
Inclusions
Accommodation
Welcome Drink Non Alcoholic.
Meals
All Transfers, All sightseeing as per Tour Itinerary
All long distance Travels
Toll Taxes, Parkings, Fuel

Comfortable vehicles AC
Chauffeur

Exclusions
